zh.Warmingham, Cheshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭爾瓦明加姆
zh.Mainwaring, Bersted, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可貝斯泰德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph De Mainwaring於1155年出生在英國爾瓦明加姆時，他的父親Roger de Mainwaring25歲，母親Ellen de Warmingham22歲。他於1179年與Amicia Meschines在英國爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Warmingham, Cheshire, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰爾瓦明加姆
zh-hans.Mainwaring, Bersted, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可貝斯泰德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph De Mainwaring于1155年出生在英国爾瓦明加姆时，他的父亲Roger de Mainwaring25岁，母亲Ellen de Warmingham22岁。他于1179年与Amicia Meschines在英国爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph De Mainwaring was born in 1155, in Warmingham, Cheshire, England, his father, Roger de Mainwaring, was 25 and his mother, Ellen de Warmingham, was 22. He married Amicia Meschines in 1179, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph De Mainwaring est né en 1155, à Warmingham, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Mainwaring, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ellen de Warmingham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Amicia Meschines en 1179, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph De Mainwaring 1155 in Warmingham, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Mainwaring 25 und seine Mutter Ellen de Warmingham 22. Er hat 1179 in Cheshire, England Amicia Meschines geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph De Mainwaring è nato il nel 1155 nel Warmingham, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Mainwaring, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Ellen de Warmingham, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Amicia Meschines nel 1179, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph De Mainwaringが1155年にイギリスチェシュアイアワーミンガムで生まれた時，父Roger de Mainwaringは25歳，母Ellen de Warminghamは22歳であった。1179年にイギリスチェシュアイアでAmicia Meschinesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph De Mainwaring(이)가 1155년 영국 체실르 워밍함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Mainwaring(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen de Warmingham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1179년 영국 체실르에서 Amicia Meschines(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph De Mainwaring nasceu em 1155, em Warmingham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Mainwaring, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ellen de Warmingham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Amicia Meschines em 1179, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph De Mainwaring родился в 1155 г. в местности вармингхам, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Mainwaring было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen de Warmingham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicia Meschines в 1179 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph De Mainwaring nació en 1155, en Warmingham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Mainwaring, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Ellen de Warmingham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Amicia Meschines en 1179, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo.
